title: Company Names Tribunal decision: DigitalIntel  Limited
body: "Application number 5418  Applicant Intel Corporation objected to the name used by DigitalIntel  Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 5 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of DigitalIntel  Limited is changed to 16294165, Ltd. "
